mapper.select: select * from chatting where user_id = #{user_id} and fri_id = #{fri_id}

SELECT rm.room_id FROM room_members rm JOIN chat_rooms cr ON rm.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cr.room_type = 'DIRECT' AND rm.user_id IN (#{user1}, #{user2}) GROUP BY rm.room_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT rm.user_id) = 2 AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members WHERE room_id = rm.room_id ) = 2

SELECT m.*,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members rm WHERE rm.room_id = m.room_id AND rm.user_id != m.sender_id AND ( rm.last_read_message_id IS NULL OR rm.last_read_message_id < m.message_id ) ) AS unreadCount
FROM messages m
WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId}
ORDER BY m.message_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages(room_id, sender_id, msg_text) VALUES(#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{msgText})
mapper.update: UPDATE room_members SET last_read_message_id = #{lastReadMessageId} WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, u.user_id AS targetUserId, u.login_id AS targetLoginId,
COUNT(DISTINCT m.message_id) AS unreadCount,
( SELECT msg_text FROM messages WHERE room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY message_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS lastMessage,
( SELECT created_at FROM messages WHERE room_id = r.room_id ORDER BY message_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS lastMessageTime
FROM room_members me
JOIN room_members other ON me.room_id = other.room_id AND other.user_id != me.user_id
JOIN users u ON other.user_id = u.user_id
JOIN chat_rooms r ON r.room_id = me.room_id
LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.room_id = r.room_id AND m.message_id > IFNULL(me.last_read_message_id, 0) AND m.sender_id != me.user_id
WHERE me.user_id = #{userId}
GROUP BY r.room_id, u.user_id
ORDER BY lastMessageTime DESC
SELECT user_id FROM room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND left_at IS NULL
